title: Velvet Persona: Personal Brand Engineering for Elites
description: A discreet agency that crafts and manages elite personal brands for high-profile individuals.
goal: Secure high-value clients seeking reputation and perception management.
offer: End-to-end personal brand creation including media strategy, visual identity, and controlled narrative positioning.
misconception: Many believe reputation is organic, ignoring how much is intentionally engineered.
targetAudience: Public figures, executives, and emerging elites looking to control perception at scale.
